name: tenup/card
title: Card
description: A post card rendered by the theme. Use variants for movie, person, or default post types.

variations.name: default
variations.title: Card
variations.description: Default post card with date and category terms.

variations.name: movie
variations.title: Movie Card
variations.description: Card for movies with viewer rating and a trailer button.

variations.name: person
variations.title: Person Card
variations.description: Card for people with a View More button.
